name: CSV Import With AI Conflict Resolution
objective: Implement CSV import with account mapping, AI-assisted duplicate detection, conflict resolution, review mode, transactional commit, de/en localization, and API-key-based feature gating.
exit_criteria: CSV upload, parsing, and account mapping work for authenticated users
AI reconciliation uses an English prompt with strict schema-validated output
Users can resolve conflicts and edit/remove staged rows before confirmation
Final import commit is transactional and persists approved decisions
Import UI and API are hidden or blocked when OPENAI_API_KEY is absent
All import workflow strings and errors are available in German and English
Typecheck, lint, and targeted tests pass for changed modules
